title: Sore throat (acute): antimicrobial prescribing (NG84)
authorsOrOrganisation: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
notes: Evidence-based guideline used for illness course, analgesia, medicated lozenges, evidence gaps and antibiotic stewardship. UK prescribing specifics are not transferred into Australian guidance. Month-only update metadata is stored as the first day and must be checked before publication.
